name: detector contract: --paths <glob> restricts scan to matching files (§2.2)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --paths "src/included/**" | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);const files=new Set((r.findings||[]).map(f=>f.file));const hasIncluded=Array.from(files).some(f=>f.includes("included"));const hasExcluded=Array.from(files).some(f=>f.includes("excluded"));if(hasIncluded&&!hasExcluded){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: paths glob not honored\n");process.exit(1)}});'
setup: mkdir -p src/included src/excluded && echo "const x: any = 1;" > src/included/a.ts && echo "const y: any = 2;" > src/excluded/b.ts
